CustomField.description: The minimum acceptable confidence score (0-100) for a tool call. When EnableConfidenceTracking__c is true and a tool call confidence falls below this value, the behaviour defined by LowConfidenceAction__c is triggered. Leave blank to disable threshold enforcement entirely.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Minimum confidence score (0-100) before LowConfidenceAction__c fires. Leave blank to track confidence without any enforcement. Requires EnableConfidenceTracking__c to be enabled.
CustomField.label: Min Confidence Threshold
